operation: First, a 2D sketch is created on the XY workplane: start at the origin (0,0), draw a 15 unit long horizontal line to (15, 0), add a 3-point arc with control point (20,5) ending at (15,10), draw a horizontal line back to (0,10), then close the sketch. This closed profile is extruded 6 units along the positive Z direction to form the base solid. Next, a new workplane is created on the top (positive Z) face of the solid, a 2D slot with length 12 and width 4 is drawn centered on this workplane, and this slot is cut entirely through the thickness of the solid to produce the final model.
geometry: The model is a moderately thick prismatic plate with one flat straight end, one convex curved rounded opposite end, and two parallel straight long edges connecting the two ends. An elongated rounded rectangular through-slot runs perpendicularly through the entire thickness of the plate, centered on the plate's top face and aligned with the plate's longitudinal axis.
function: This is an adjustable mounting spacer or bracket, designed to support adjustable fastener placement via its through-slot, with a rounded end to interface smoothly with curved mating surfaces in mechanical assemblies.
